channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Donald Trump Jr., Elon Musk joke about purchasing MSNBC
item.description: Musk’s exchange with Trump Jr. is similar to one he had with a Twitter user in 2017 after he was encouraged to purchase the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Senate Intelligence Committee to ask Gabbard 'lots of questions': Lankford
item.description: Sen. James Lankford (R-Okla.) said Sunday that the Senate Intelligence Committee will ask President-elect Trump’s pick for director of national intelligence, former Democratic Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii), “lots of questions.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Harris disappears from spotlight, vacations in Hawaii after election loss
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris has kept a low profile in the weeks since losing the election to President-elect Trump and is expected to remain in Hawaii for a week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration takes shape: President-elect completes top 15 Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Trump has chosen an ideologically diverse Cabinet for his second term by selecting an array of establishment and unconventional candidates for the top 15 posts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White House mostly mum after Trump victory
item.description: The White House has taken its show largely behind closed doors after Vice President Harris’s stinging defeat to Donald Trump. Harris has all but disappeared from the public eye, jetting off to Hawaii after a few scarce appearances around Washington following her massive loss on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump taps Texan Brooke Rollins as agriculture secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump tapped Brooke Rollins, who served in his first administration as director of the Office of American Innovation and acting director of the Domestic Policy Council, as his agriculture secretary.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A look at how some of Trump's picks to lead health agencies could help carry out Kennedy's overhaul
item.description: The team that President-elect Donald Trump has selected to lead federal health agencies in his second administration includes a retired congressman, a surgeon and a former talk-show host.
item.dc:creator: MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ric Grenell under consideration to be Trump's point man on Ukraine: report
item.description: Former acting Director of National Intelligence Richard Grenell is reportedly under consideration by President-elect Trump to be special envoy for the Russia-Ukraine conflict.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NJ Rep. Gottheimer vows to fight congestion pricing
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) — Rep. Josh Gottheimer has been a staunch opponent of congestion pricing since its introduction. Now, with a new plan set in motion by New York Gov.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: Vance takes on a more visible transition role, working to boost Trump's most contentious picks
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After several weeks working mostly behind closed doors, Vice President-elect JD Vance returned to Capitol Hill this week in a new, more visible role: Helping Donald Trump try to get his most contentious Cabinet picks to confirmation in the Senate, where Vance has served for the las
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republican who lost Minnesota House race sues claiming DFL winner lives outside district
item.description: The Roseville-area court challenge is the latest legal action Republicans are using to try and break the tie in the Minnesota House next year and muster up a majority in one chamber.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Senate reaches deal on stalled Biden judicial nominees
item.description: The Senate announced a deal Thursday to complete work on seven of President Biden’s nine stalled judicial nominees, who sparked an intense fight on the Senate floor this week.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada attorney general pledges to combat 'unconstitutional mandates' amid Trump election
item.description: Democratic Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford said his office was prepared to address any “fear and uncertainty” following the election of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Manhattan DA opposes Trump’s bid to dismiss hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors on Tuesday said they will oppose President-elect Trump’s demand to dismiss his New York criminal conviction following the election, instead floating the idea the judge could freeze the case until Trump leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5
